post.content:
I attended onsite interview last weekend. 
**OA**: Gave 3 weeks Back. 4 qstns/ 70 mins. Solved 3 + 1 partially. 556/600 after normalization. Got an invite for onsite event.

All the below rounds happened same day at uber office. From 9AM-6PM: 
**Screening Round**: Similar to [Alien Dictionary](https://leetcode.com/problems/alien-dictionary/description/)  with some changes.
**Coding Round 1**: Similar to [Haunted House](https://www.hackerrank.com/contests/w15/challenges/haunted-house). But some extra contraints and different wording.
**Coding Round 2(Machine coding + LLD)**: Design a system like kafka with concurrency support
**System Design**: Design Uber Eats
**HM Round**: Standard Behavioural Questions + Last project discussion

And I have following result of different rounds.

**Phone Screen(DSA)**: YES
**Coding Round 1(DSA)**: YES
**Coding Round 2(Machine coding + LLD)** : Soft Yes
**System Design**: YES
**HM Round**: YES

My machine coding round didn't go that well and the interviewer wanted the solution in a specific way which I was not able to code.
Is there any chances of callback or offer. Or should I keep my hopes down?
Any idea how long the Uber HR take to give feedback on accept or Reject?

**Update**:  Rejected. Recruiter mentioned needed atleast one Strong YES for the org i am interviewing for to consider my profile. Anyway had a great experince interviewing with them. **Life goes on**.
Honestly this is kind of messed up...5/5  yes means candidate is more than qualified....Great attitude bro....see you at the top.
What is your YOE? Can you suggest me how should I prepare for this interview as my interview is in 2 weeks?
You should get the offer according to me. If you have any competing offers use that to push them to share the verdict with you.
Can you share more detail on DSA and machine coding round? Since it\'s in person, you just need to explain logic? Do you need to code somewhere?
Oh. Interviewing is happening onsite now
You should pass, I think. What\'s the location?
could you please share your detailed interview experience?
What was asked in machine coding(LLD)?
After how many days, you got to know the feedback of phone screen? Were all rounds on same day? virtual or F2F?
